description: Playwright browser & Node.js MCP. ARIA refs, screenshots, ref-based interactions.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.serkan-ozal/browser-devtools-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Platform: browser (default) or node for Node.js backend debugging.
environmentVariables.name: PLATFORM

environmentVariables.description: Port for HTTP transport.
environmentVariables.name: PORT

environmentVariables.description: Idle session timeout (seconds).
environmentVariables.name: SESSION_IDLE_SECONDS

environmentVariables.description: Interval for checking idle sessions (seconds).
environmentVariables.name: SESSION_IDLE_CHECK_SECONDS

environmentVariables.description: Close session when socket closes.
environmentVariables.name: SESSION_CLOSE_ON_SOCKET_CLOSE

environmentVariables.description: Maximum console messages to buffer.
environmentVariables.name: CONSOLE_MESSAGES_BUFFER_SIZE

environmentVariables.description: Maximum HTTP requests to buffer.
environmentVariables.name: HTTP_REQUESTS_BUFFER_SIZE

environmentVariables.description: When true, include server instructions in MCP server info (browser platform). Default: true.
environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_SERVER_INSTRUCTIONS_ENABLE

environmentVariables.description: When true, include UI_DEBUGGING_POLICY in server policies (browser platform). Default: false.
environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_POLICY_UI_DEBUGGING_ENABLE

environmentVariables.description: Run browser in headless mode.
environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_HEADLESS_ENABLE

environmentVariables.description: Use persistent browser context (preserves cookies, localStorage, extensions).
environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_PERSISTENT_ENABLE

environmentVariables.description: CDP attach: http(s) root or ws(s) URL. Resolves via /json/version, /json/list, or ws /devtools/browser (Chrome 136+). Mutually exclusive with BROWSER_PERSISTENT_ENABLE.
environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_CDP_ENDPOINT_URL

environmentVariables.description: When true and no BROWSER_CDP_ENDPOINT_URL: probe 127.0.0.1:9222 then :9229 for CDP. Else use BROWSER_CDP_ENDPOINT_URL or default http://127.0.0.1:9222.
environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_CDP_ENABLE

environmentVariables.description: On loopback CDP failure, if Chrome is running, open chrome://inspect/#remote-debugging. Default true. Set false to disable.
environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_CDP_OPEN_INSPECT

environmentVariables.description: Directory for persistent browser context user data.
environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_PERSISTENT_USER_DATA_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Use system-installed Chrome browser instead of Playwright's bundled browser.
environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_USE_INSTALLED_ON_SYSTEM

environmentVariables.description: Custom browser executable path.
environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_EXECUTABLE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Browser locale (e.g., "en-US", "tr-TR").
environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_LOCALE

environmentVariables.description: Enable OpenTelemetry integration.
environmentVariables.name: OTEL_ENABLE

environmentVariables.description: OpenTelemetry service name.
environmentVariables.name: OTEL_SERVICE_NAME

environmentVariables.description: OpenTelemetry service version.
environmentVariables.name: OTEL_SERVICE_VERSION

environmentVariables.description: Directory containing OpenTelemetry bundle files.
environmentVariables.name: OTEL_ASSETS_DIR

environmentVariables.description: User interaction events to instrument (comma-separated, e.g., "click,submit").
environmentVariables.name: OTEL_INSTRUMENTATION_USER_INTERACTION_EVENTS

environmentVariables.description: OpenTelemetry exporter type: "otlp/http", "console", or "none".
environmentVariables.name: OTEL_EXPORTER_TYPE

environmentVariables.description: OpenTelemetry collector base URL (e.g., "http://localhost:4318").
environmentVariables.name: OTEL_EXPORTER_HTTP_URL

environmentVariables.description: OpenTelemetry exporter HTTP headers (comma-separated key=value pairs).
environmentVariables.name: OTEL_EXPORTER_HTTP_HEADERS

environmentVariables.description: AWS region for Bedrock usage.
environmentVariables.name: AWS_REGION

environmentVariables.description: AWS profile name for Bedrock usage.
environmentVariables.name: AWS_PROFILE

environmentVariables.description: Enable Amazon Bedrock usage.
environmentVariables.name: AMAZON_BEDROCK_ENABLE

environmentVariables.description: Amazon Bedrock image embedding model ID.
environmentVariables.name: AMAZON_BEDROCK_IMAGE_EMBED_MODEL_ID

environmentVariables.description: Amazon Bedrock text embedding model ID.
environmentVariables.name: AMAZON_BEDROCK_TEXT_EMBED_MODEL_ID

environmentVariables.description: Amazon Bedrock vision model ID.
environmentVariables.name: AMAZON_BEDROCK_VISION_MODEL_ID

environmentVariables.description: Figma API access token for design comparison.
environmentVariables.name: FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Figma API base URL.
environmentVariables.name: FIGMA_API_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Daemon mode port (CLI).
environmentVariables.name: DAEMON_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Daemon mode idle session timeout (seconds).
environmentVariables.name: DAEMON_SESSION_IDLE_SECONDS

environmentVariables.description: Daemon mode idle session check interval (seconds).
environmentVariables.name: DAEMON_SESSION_IDLE_CHECK_SECONDS

environmentVariables.description: When true, include server instructions in MCP server info (node platform). Default: true.
environmentVariables.name: NODE_SERVER_INSTRUCTIONS_ENABLE

environmentVariables.description: When true, include NODE_DEBUGGING_POLICY in server policies (node platform). Default: false.
environmentVariables.name: NODE_POLICY_DEBUGGING_ENABLE

environmentVariables.description: Inspector host for debug_connect when MCP runs in Docker (e.g. host.docker.internal). Default: 127.0.0.1.
environmentVariables.name: NODE_INSPECTOR_HOST

environmentVariables.description: When true, omit tool output schema from MCP tool registration (can reduce token usage for some clients).
environmentVariables.name: TOOL_OUTPUT_SCHEMA_DISABLE

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated tool domains to enable (e.g. navigation,interaction,a11y). Unset = all tools. Browser: a11y, content, debug, figma, interaction, navigation, o11y, react, run, stub, sync. Node: debug, run.
environmentVariables.name: AVAILABLE_TOOL_DOMAINS
